summary: A rebroadcast FOX 8 news package in which former Thomasville Furniture Industries workers in North Carolina reflect on their jobs and the closure of the plants that sent manufacturing overseas. It is a standard reporter-narrated segment with drone footage of the demolished factory, interviews, and archival photos, used to frame an economic/trade message, not produced entertainment content.
notable_text: FOX 8 chyron: 'THOMASVILLE / FORMER THOMASVILLE FURNITURE INDUSTRIES FACTORY WORKERS SPEAK ABOUT THEIR TIME WORKING THERE'.
